figures.caption: Table 7: Transposed view of Table 2. Rows correspond to evaluation metrics and methods, while columns correspond to backbone models. All values are identical to those reported in Table 2.

Table 6: Ablation study under the DeepSeek-V3.2-Exp backbone. We report 95% confidence intervals (CI) for semantic realism and inter-patient diversity, and mean ± standard deviation for G-Eval dimensions. ↑ indicates higher is better.
Table 5: The structured question list used for dialogue generation and assessment.
